ability.awakenawakennomi.airburst.descri: Creates explosive bursts of air around the user for 30 seconds; non-destructive to blocks.
ability.awakenawakennomi.ancient_spine_s: The user extends their dorsal fin and rolls forward. Deals damage to entities in the path using the sharpened sail.
ability.awakenawakennomi.aura_of_frictio: Entities within the aura ignite when moving quickly. Upon expiration, the user suffers a severe burn backlash.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_allosaur: Transforms the user into the awaken version of allosaurus heavy point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_axolotl_: Transforms the user into the awaken version of axolotl heavy point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_bison_he: Transforms the user into the awaken version of bison heavy point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_brachios: Transforms the user into the awaken version of brachiosaurus heavy point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_giraffe_: Transforms the user into the awaken version of giraffe heavy point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_human_fo: Transforms the user into a awaken human, increasing its strength.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_kame_wal: Transforms the user into the awaken version of kame walk point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_leopard_: Transforms the user into the awaken version of leopard heavy point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_mammoth_: Transforms the user into the awaken version of mammoth heavy point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_pteranod: Transforms the user into the awaken version of pteranodon assault point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_sai_heav: Transforms the user into the awaken version of sai heavy point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.awaken_zou_heav: Transforms the user into the awaken version of Zou heavy point.
ability.awakenawakennomi.bakumetal_genes: Fuses rare materials within the user's body to create Bakumetal. Recipe: 1 Obsidian + 1 Diamond + 1 Gold + 1 Iron → 1 Bakumetal.
ability.awakenawakennomi.beta_beta_ocean: Creates a vast ocean of mucus around the user, covering the ground with sticky slime that hinders enemy movements.
ability.awakenawakennomi.blast_jump.desc: The user detonates an explosion beneath their feet, launching themselves high into the air.
ability.awakenawakennomi.brachio_stomp.d: The user stomps the ground multiple times in quick succession, dealing damage in pulses to all entities within a radius around them.
ability.awakenawakennomi.cake_transmutat: Shoots a cake beam that transforms the target.
Hit targets will slowly turn into cake.
ability.awakenawakennomi.candy_transmuta: Shoots a candy beam that transforms the target.
Hit targets will turn into candy.
ability.awakenawakennomi.cellular_overlo: an Awaken self-buff. Instantly clears all negative effects from the user and applies regeneration bonus for a short duration.
ability.awakenawakennomi.diffraction.des: Turns the user's body into a prism to fire a stream of 7 rainbow projectiles.
ability.awakenawakennomi.diosa_fleur.des: Summon a gigantic clone of yourself to fight alongside you. The clone inherits your abilities and grows stronger the longer you maintain it.
ability.awakenawakennomi.dislocation_pun: Delivers a surgical blow that separates the enemy's body parts. Inflicts the Dismember effect, severely reducing the target's combat capabilities.
ability.awakenawakennomi.drought_calamit: Embodying the calamity known as "The Drought," the user channels the Awakened Mammoth's ruinous power into the earth. With a single, cataclysmic stomp, moisture is instantly vaporized from the soil and the air, leaving behind only a barren wasteland and decaying foes.
ability.awakenawakennomi.empire_of_decay: Creates a zone of rapid oxidation. Entities inside receive a rust effect that scales in power the longer they stay within the area.
ability.awakenawakennomi.ethereal_whispe: Launch a spectral whisper projectile that damages enemies and disorients their senses with haunting echoes.
ability.awakenawakennomi.fiddle_overdriv: The user forces their Zoan heart to pump blood at a dangerous velocity, pushing their muscles beyond their natural limits. Steam erupts from the user's nose as they enter a state of frenzied power.
ability.awakenawakennomi.glittering_stor: Creates a controllable tornado of glittering diamond particles that devastates everything in its path.
ability.awakenawakennomi.gods_bulwark.de: Infuses the user's body with barrier energy. Provides temporary and total invulnerability to all incoming damage.
ability.awakenawakennomi.gravity_zone.de: Creates a gravitational field that lightens allies for increased mobility and increases the weight of enemies to restrict their movement.
ability.awakenawakennomi.gullivers_night: Miniaturize all nearby entities, drastically reducing their physical size and offensive power.
ability.awakenawakennomi.high_frequency_: Creates a sonic barrier that destroys projectiles and inflicts the Deafened status on anyone passing through it.
ability.awakenawakennomi.hormonal_fog.de: Unleashes a thick biological mist. Allies within the area receive positive hormonal surges, while enemies are struck by negative hormonal imbalances.
ability.awakenawakennomi.horn_drill.desc: The user spins and charges in a straight line, dealing heavy piercing damage to all entities they pass through.
A pinnacle technique of feline agility and lethal precision. The user enters a focused state of absolute stillness, coiling their muscles to their breaking point. In a heartbeat, they vanish, reappearing behind their enemies in a blur of motion. All those caught in the leopard's path are struck by a singular, invisible laceration.
ability.awakenawakennomi.infinity_kilo_p: Concentrates infinite weight into a punch. Deals massive damage and applies extreme horizontal knockback, launching targets a vast distance away.
ability.awakenawakennomi.inga_impact.des: Manifests the user's Karma as a devastating fist projectile.
Damage and size scale with accumulated Karma.
ability.awakenawakennomi.inga_samsara.de: The ultimate expression of Karmic Justice. The user expands their spiritual pressure to create a "Domain of Retribution." Within this zone, the individual fates of all living beings are forcibly linked to the user. The laws of causality are absolute here: if the user bleeds, everyone bleeds.
ability.awakenawakennomi.invisible_touch: Turns a targeted block invisible after hitting it.
Creates an invisible zone that spreads invisibility to nearby blocks.
ability.awakenawakennomi.ivory_catastrop: The elephant charges forward with devastating ivory tusks, spinning rapidly to impale and destroy everything in its path.
ability.awakenawakennomi.kirimanjaro.des: Compresses the neck and fires the head forward at high speed to strike enemies with a powerful nose-first impact.
ability.awakenawakennomi.kyozo_no_kuni.d: Constructs a 'Mirror World' where reality is overwritten. All entities within the domain are forced to adopt the user's exact physique and appearance, creating a chaotic legion of identical reflections.
ability.awakenawakennomi.living_feast.de: Sacrifice your own hunger and saturation to breathe life into a loyal Cake Golem. The more nourishment you surrender, the larger and more powerful your creation becomes.
ability.awakenawakennomi.mogu_dig.descri: Lets the user dig trough blocks.
ability.awakenawakennomi.netto_jigoku.de: Creates an infernal zone around the user. Creatures inside accumulate intense burning stacks the longer they remain in the area.
ability.awakenawakennomi.one_man_army.de: Infuse the revolutionary spirit within yourself to transcend your limits and become an unstoppable one-man army for a brief duration.
The user compresses air into a focused laser that pierces the target and detonates inside them, causing devastating internal damage.
ability.awakenawakennomi.reverse_slow.de: A multi-stage Awakening skill. Inverts Noroma rays to provide four escalating levels of Movement Speed
ability.awakenawakennomi.reverse_slow_sm: Running into enemies at high speed deals damage
ability.awakenawakennomi.rhythmic_purgat: An Awakened technique that transforms the battlefield into a torture chamber of sound. The user imposes a lethal tempo on the area, vibrating the very air at a specific frequency. Victims inside feel a growing pressure until the "beat" drops, causing their own bodies to act as the instrument of their destruction.
ability.awakenawakennomi.shugan.descript: The hand morphs and claws elongate to deal massive raw damage at point-blank range. Focuses purely on high-impact physical destruction.
ability.awakenawakennomi.slick_disarm.de: Coat your fists in slickness and strike your target. Their hands become too slippery to keep a grip, forcing them to drop items from both hands.
ability.awakenawakennomi.smooth_world.de: Creates a smooth domain around the user. Creatures inside lose traction and slide uncontrollably, weakening their ability to fight effectively.
ability.awakenawakennomi.spin.descriptio: The user retreats into their shell and spins rapidly, knocking back nearby enemies and deflecting attacks.
ability.awakenawakennomi.spirit_seal.des: An on-hit Awakening skill that "silences" the opponent, preventing them from using any abilities for a limited time.
ability.awakenawakennomi.spring_domain.d: Transmutes the floor into a bouncy spring-like surface. Any entity hitting the ground is automatically rebounded into the air. Negates all fall damage within the zone.
ability.awakenawakennomi.spring_fajin.de: Upon activation, the user automatically charges kinetic energy and launches forward at extreme speed.
ability.awakenawakennomi.tei_kasane.desc: A high-speed priming technique where the user vibrates their wing membranes at such a frequency that the edges become serrated
ability.awakenawakennomi.titan.descripti: Allows the user to increase their size to that of a titan.
ability.awakenawakennomi.titan_smash.des: Allows the user to smash as a Titan.
ability.awakenawakennomi.titan_trample.d: Running speed increases with acceleration trampling any nearby entity.
ability.awakenawakennomi.total_isolation: Encases a target in a soundproof bubble. This ability blocks all game sounds and disables all chat interactions (reading and writing) for the victim.
ability.awakenawakennomi.waterpool_domai: Transmutes the ground into a liquid-like surface. All entities inside gain the ability to swim through solid blocks as if they were water, allowing fluid movement through terrain.
ability.awakenawakennomi.word_of_recover: A supreme healing technique that channels the user's life force into a single touch. Upon contact, the target’s health is greatly restored.
ability.awakenawakennomi.world_wash.desc: Creates a large soap domain around the user. All entities inside are instantly "washed," purifying the target and stripping them of their combat readiness.
ability.message.need_suke_invisible: You need Suke Invisible to use this ability.
awakenawakennomi.ability.bakumetal_genes: Synthesis failed! Missing materials for Bakumetal: Obsidian, Diamond, Gold Ingot, Iron Ingot
awakenawakennomi.ability.ground_only: You must be on the ground to use this ability.
awakenawakennomi.ability.missing_message: A message is missing here please contact the dev to fix it.
